message:
feat(python): numpy.fft.fftn wrapper parity (franken_numpy-6d7q)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.fft.fftn covering the optional
shape tuple `s`, arbitrary axes selection (default: all axes), norm
conventions ('backward'/'ortho'/'forward'), and optional `out=`
destination. Test covers 3-D default, s=(4,4,4) zero-padding,
axes=(-1,-2) subset, single-axis axes=(0,), norm=ortho and forward,
complex128 input, 1-D degradation to fft, and ifftn∘fftn round-trip
identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
